description: Founder narrative is clearly attributed to the co-founder — no disguised endorsement. Should pass ADV-007.
text:
A note from the co-founder.

As FarmThru's co-founder, I think the most honest thing I can say about this raise is that we're betting on a slow, hard model.

Regenerative grocery isn't a quick win. The farms we work with take years to rebuild soil. Customers who care enough to pay a fair price for it have to be earned, not bought with discounts. And building a brand from a single Brookvale hub means staying patient while the bigger players chase scale.

If you back this round, you're backing that view. Not a hockey-stick projection. A long, deliberate build that we believe will compound into something meaningful.

Sarah Wilkinson
Co-founder & Director, FarmThru

Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
